frame_analyses.description: Gauze with marked circle visible, suspended between clamps, no instruments visible yet
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean setup with clear circular marking approximately 4cm diameter

frame_analyses.description: Scissors entering field from right side, approaching the marked circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Scissors positioned for entry at approximately 6 o'clock position on circle

frame_analyses.description: Active cutting along the marked line, progressing clockwise from 6 o'clock toward 9 o'clock
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Scissors following marked line closely, steady cutting motion

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, now at approximately 12 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to follow marked line with minimal deviation

frame_analyses.description: Cut progressing past 3 o'clock position, approximately 75% complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent cutting technique maintained, gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Cut approaching full circle completion, connecting back to initial cut point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final portion of cut being completed, circular pattern nearly finished

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut completed, cut-out piece visible as separate from main gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Complete circular cut achieved, gauze remains attached to clamps

penalties.description: Minor deviation visible at 3 o'clock position, estimated 1mm outside marked line
Slight deviation at 9 o'clock position, estimated 0.5mm outside marked line

confidence_rationale: Excellent visibility of cutting action and timeline. Some uncertainty in measuring exact mm deviations from oblique viewing angle, particularly at 3 and 9 o'clock positions.
cannot_determine: Precise mm measurements at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle
Exact deviation measurements at 1:30, 4:30, 7:30, 10:30 o'clock positions
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion time and high precision cutting. Minimal deviations from marked line.
strengths: Very fast completion time (38s vs 60-90s expert benchmark)
Excellent gauze handling - remained attached throughout
improvement_suggestions: Minor attention to precision at 3 o'clock position to eliminate 1mm deviation
